title: Axis sets invalid SVG visibility="false" on visible tick elements

in_scope: Fix visibility attribute assignment in axisBase.js lines 124 and 130
Replace && short-circuit with ternary returning null for non-hidden case
out_of_scope: Adding tests beyond verifying the fix
acceptance_criteria: tickPaths visibility returns 'hidden' when hidden=true, null when hidden=false
labelOffsets visibility returns 'hidden' when hidden=true, null when hidden=false
No visibility="false" attributes appear in rendered SVG
All 377 existing tests continue to pass
assumptions: D3 .attr() removes attribute when value is null (documented D3 behavior)
No downstream code relies on visibility="false" being set

risks.risk: Existing tests may not cover visibility attribute behavior
